posts.title: Time for a Fall Bra Refresh with Soma
posts.excerpt: This post was sponsored by Soma, but all opinions are my own. With all of the fun fashions of fall here once again, it’s the perfect time to give your top drawer an upgrade! I must admit, I’m that girl who will wear a bra until it’s falling apart and the wire is poking me […]
posts.contentHtml:
This post was sponsored by Soma, but all opinions are my own.

With all of the fun fashions of fall here once again, it’s the perfect time to give your top drawer an upgrade! I must admit, I’m that girl who will wear a bra until it’s falling apart and the wire is poking me in the ribs. So when Soma came knocking with the opportunity to try styles of bras and panties that are not only comfortable but also but also pretty, they didn’t have to ask twice! And I love that Soma offers such a great variety of styles and colors (the new Blackberry color and Embroidered finish are STUNNING!). From pushup (my favorite) to lightly lined or wireless to t-shirt friendly, Soma has a style for you! We’ll even talk about the matching panties that just give you that give you a great foundation when you’re getting dressed.

Embraceable Enchanting Lace Push-Up Bra

Everyone needs a black bra and panty set in their lineup. I’m a huge fan of push-up bras! I’m not overly blessed up top, so any help I can get accentuating what I do have, I’ll take it. The Embraceable Enchanting Lace Push-Up Bra, unlike most push-up bras, doesn’t sacrifice any comfort. It’s soft, lightweight, and offers great lift/support. Even better, the back has a J-hook that can easily convert the back to a racerback style. It’s like having two bras one. As you can tell from my picture above, it gets the job done. Offered in seven colors, the Embraceable Enchanting Lace Push-Up Bra is hard to beat. It also pairs perfectly with the Almost Naked Hipster Panties (available in cheeky and thong, as well). Shop here.

Lightest Lift Lace Plunge Bra

Can we just take a moment to appreciate the GORGEOUS Blackberry hue of this bra? The perfect combination of feminine and comfort, the Lightest Lift Lace Plunge Bra will quickly become a new favorite. The plunge neckline makes it the perfect choice for those lower-cut tops. And with straps that easily convert to a racerback style, you’ll reach for this comfortable bra over and over. Shop here.

Wildflower Embroidered Push-Up Bra

This bra is a SHOWSTOPPER! Featuring gorgeous embroidery and feminine lace straps, it’s also breathable and very lightweight. Again, you’ll have all of the desired features of a push-up bra without sacrificing any comfort. For me, one of the highlights of this bra was the soft spandex gripper that keeps the strap in place (huge win!). Trust me when I tell you, this bra gives you all the feminine feels. Pair it with the matching panties or the Vanishing Tummy Retro Thong (I loved the color “Hush”) for a great pairing. Shop here.

With a Good Foundation, You Can Build Great Looks

Now that my top drawer is ready for fall with the perfect variety of bras, it’s time to get dressed. Check out the latest fall looks from White House Black Market. Shop these looks here. Which look is your favorite? Drop a comment below to let me know!

posts.title: Homemade Sweet & Smoky BBQ Sauce
posts.excerpt: Cue the BBQ recipes this holiday week! For me, it's all about the sauce.
posts.contentHtml:
Cue the BBQ recipes this holiday week! For me, it’s all about the sauce. THIS sauce! I love any and all BBQ sauces, so it’s hard for me to pick a favorite. I love sweet sauces, smoky sauces, bold sauces, even spicy sauces! So I created this recipe to incorporate all of my favorite elements using simple ingredients.

This sauce is fantastic on grilled chicken drumsticks, hamburgers, ribs, anything! And the best part, this sauce can be totally customized. Use your imagination and make it your own, but I guarantee you’ll WOW your guests with this sauce at any get-together!

posts.contentHtml:
Can you ever really have too many bags?  I am such a sucker for a cute bag, and I buy way too many every year.  I love a luxury bag as much as anyone, but these five summer bags have stolen my heart.  Of course, I “added to cart”!  Check out these five bags, all under $40, that will steal your heart, too!

Straw Bucket Bag

I couldn’t add this drawstring beauty to my cart fast enough!  At only $30, this bag is absolutely perfect for vacation!

 

Boho Bucket Bag

When I say I gasped when I saw this bag, I am not exaggerating!  It’s literally a boho dream with gorgeous detail.  At only $35, it’s a must have.  I predict a quick sell out on this beauty!

 

Mini Crossbody with Tortoise Chain Detail

This bag was another love-at-first-site moment for me!  It truly looks like it cost a fortune.  But at only $25, it leaves plenty of budget to grab another bag.

 

Straw Flap Crossbody Bag

I just love the simplicity of this straw crossbody.  Lightweight and packable, this is a great vacation option.  The flap and crossbody style made it another easy favorite.

 

Straw Tote with Circle Handle

And last but not least, this beautiful structured tote with circle handles is a perfect option for the beach but cute enough for every day use.  I just love the stitching detail, and it’s an absolute steal at only $40.

Which one was your favorite?  Leave me a comment below to let me know.  And if you’re looking for a few new straw hats (another obsession of mine!) to add to your collection, click here to see my current favorites of this season!

posts.title: My Top 5 Must-haves for Spring from H&M
posts.excerpt: Never have I ever been more excited to see the beginning of spring! The sun is shining on my face, everything is in bloom again, and heavier winter fashions are taking a backseat to gorgeous pops of color and light-weight wardrobe staples. Here are my top 5 must-have pieces from H&M that need to find […]
posts.contentHtml:
Never have I ever been more excited to see the beginning of spring!  The sun is shining on my face, everything is in bloom again, and heavier winter fashions are taking a backseat to gorgeous pops of color and light-weight wardrobe staples.  Here are my top 5 must-have pieces from H&M that need to find their way to your closet for the spring season and beyond.

For me, basics are a must.  The older I get, the more I realize that you really only need a few statement pieces or trendy looks for a new season. The rest of your wardrobe should consist of basics like this neutral double-breasted blazer, a closet favorite that can easily be dressed up or down.  H&M blazers tend to be oversized, so I did a medium (it was plenty roomy).  Style this staple with denim, sweats, leggings, faux-leather bottoms, joggers….and now you see why it’s truly a must-have for spring!

By now, I’m sure you’ve heard the debate as to whether or not skinny jeans are outdated.  In my humble opinion, skinny jeans will ALWAYS have a place in a well-rounded wardrobe.  That being said, straight-cut cropped jeans like this black pair are the “it” jeans of spring.  They have more versatility than any other style of jeans, mostly because you can pair them with so many different types of shoes.  Heels dress them up, chunky tennies dress them down.  H&M jeans tend to be more rigid, so I always size up.  Another must have!

Sweater vests were a huge part of 60’s and 70’s fashion.  One thing you can always bank on with fashion is that most things make a comeback down the road long after they go out of style.  This year, the sweater vest is the comeback kid.  Paired with an oversized white shirt (great option here) or even by itself, this vest is a trendy option that isn’t super spendy.

The buy of the season at H&M is this gem right here, a gorgeous satin-like blouse.  While it comes in several color options, this neutral beige shade can stand on its own with a great pair of jeans or could just as easily be layered for an elegant pairing.  What size you choose will depend on the fit you prefer.  I went with a medium.  At only $17.99, you will not find a better buy at H&M this spring!

Ahhhh, white jeans.  Who hasn’t been traumatized by a pair of white jeans before?  I know I have been!  But this pair of cropped straight jeans in a gorgeous, barely off-white hue will become your new best friend for spring.  Again, sizing up in H&M denim is usually a good idea.  I’ve already worn them multiple times this year, both with a monochromatic look and with a high-contrast top.  I wouldn’t steer you wrong, I promise.  These pass the test to be in your closet.

A few honorable mentions…

I have a few more pieces that should probably make the cut for your closet.  Square-toed mules are hot, hot, hot right now.  I love this option!  Also, H&M stands at the head of the class for affordable sweats that are still trendy.  I love the white option for this set (top here-size up, bottoms here-size down).  And I’m going to be throw in one more pair of jeans that I consider a great pair for the season, these full-length straight leg lovelies.  They are very narrow through the hip, so size accordingly.

Leave a comment below, and tell me what your spring must-haves are.  And if Target is more your jam, find some of my favorites here!

Shop the post

Happy February!  Even though we are still in the middle of a frigid winter, Target is starting to roll out some adorable pieces for spring.  And I’m here for it!  Here are a few of my favorite finds.

I am loving this cardigan sweater!  But this is not your grandpa’s sweater!  The crop length makes it great for styling several different ways.  After you layer on some accessories, you could easily wear this out for date night!  I sized up to a large for an oversized fit.

Shop the Post

 

I cannot say it loud enough how CUTE this jacket is for spring!  It’s lightweight and cinches at the waist, making it so darn flattering.  Grab one while you can because it is selling fast!

Shop the Post

Shop the Post

Shop the Post

posts.title: Most Loved Items from 2020
posts.excerpt: With the new year upon us, I wanted to share the most-loved items of 2020. It's always fun for me to take a look back and see what items you enjoyed as much as I did. I'll share my personal "Top 5" things that I can't (or just don't want to) live without, too! 1. […]
posts.contentHtml:
With the new year upon us, I wanted to share the most-loved items of 2020. It’s always fun for me to take a look back and see what items you enjoyed as much as I did.  I’ll share my personal “Top 5” things that I can’t (or just don’t want to) live without, too!

1.  White Button-Down Boyfriend Shirt

By a landslide, your most-loved item of 2020 was this oversized button-down shirt.  Who would think that such a simple and traditional piece of clothing would be my most-sold piece?!  But it is so versatile, I am not surprised!  I have styled it so many ways.  This is a super affordable and timeless shirt you will wear again and again!  Check out my favorite ways to style it here.

2.  Distressed Denim Jacket

This one doesn’t surprise me at all!  You all know how I feel about denim jackets, and this one tops my list!  I sized up to a medium (it’s already oversized).  The trucker-style and perfect amount of distressing on this jacket makes it hard to beat.  I did an entire blog post on different ways to style it, check that out here.

3.  Layering necklaces

Layering chunkier necklaces was by far one of my favorite trends of 2020.  And I don’t see this trend fading anytime soon.  These pieces from A Styled Collection will become your go-to.  Such amazing quality!

4.  Ombre Sweatsuit

Another non-surprise here!  2020 was definitely the year where elevated loungewear took center stage.  This adorable and affordable set is still available, so grab it while you can.  Pants run TTS, and I sized up to a large on the top to make it very roomy.

5.  Oversized Sweater

The coziness of this sweater cannot be overstated!  In true fashion, I loved it so much that I bought it in several colors.  It is legging friendly and generously sized.  I grabbed a small in this one.  You will have this sweater on repeat, trust me!

Shop the Post

Last year was one for the books!  When staying home became the new norm, our “must-have” list definitely changed.  Here are a few things that I just can’t live without!

1.  Faux-leather leggings

Even though being comfy while we worked was all the rage, no one said we could be stylish, to0!  These faux-leather leggings from Spanx will forever have a place in my heart and wardrobe.  Most people size up.  You want them to do their job but not cut off or circulation, lol.  I wear a size 26 in denim and wear a medium in the leggings.

2.  Slim can cooler

It’s safe to say that my love for my new can coolers is more of an obsessions.  If you love a cold drink while you sit at your desk, you will definitely love them, too!  I actually a cooler to fit every can size.  See the 12 ounce cooler here, and the 16 ounce cooler here.

3.  Barefoot Dreams Blanket

The indisputable winner of cozy blankets is this throw from Barefoot Dreams.  While there is a luxury version for $180, you can snag one here for just $50.   At this price, they sell out EVERY time they restock, but if you keep checking, you can find them.  They restock in the morning, so check early to make sure you grab one.  You will NOT regret the investment, and you probably won’t want to share it, either.

4.  Pellet Ice Maker

I’ve never been able to explain my obsession with Sonic ice.  So one of the highlights of 2020 had to be when we finally decided to treat ourselves to this countertop ice maker so that we could enjoy this delicacy at home.  It’s worth every penny!

5.  Combat boots

Like a lot of 90’s fashion trends, Dr Marten combat boots came roaring back in style last year.  One of the best things to come out of 2020, if you ask me!  The 1460 version truly is the most comfortable combat boot I have ever owned.  It falls into the must-have category, without a doubt.

I’d love to know what your must-haves were for 2020.  Leave a comment below and tell me what made your list!

Shop the Post

posts.title: How to Style Neutrals from the Same Color Palette
posts.excerpt: The holidays are over (moment of silence...I love the holidays!), which means wearing those festive pops of red takes a backseat to my other favorite fashion trend - neutrals. And something about winter just calls for cream, beige, and all of the neutrals. So let's talk about how to style some of my favorite neutral […]
posts.contentHtml:
The holidays are over (moment of silence…I love the holidays!), which means wearing those festive pops of red takes a backseat to my other favorite fashion trend – neutrals.  And something about winter just calls for cream, beige, and all of the neutrals.  So let’s talk about how to style some of my favorite neutral hues!

I love the simplicity of taking colors that are similar to each other and pairing them together for a classic look.  The colors don’t have to match exactly, and that’s the best part.  When you have pieces in the same color family, you can mix and match for multiple looks.

I paired my favorite camel-colored Marc Fisher boots (these extremely versatile and comfortable boots are always on repeat!) with a rust-colored skinny ankle pant.  Cream is the king of the neutral family, so I added a chunky-knit turtleneck sweater and layered it with a trendy caramel teddy coat from Palmer Clothing (use code TFS20 to get 20% off your entire purchase).

The frigid winters of the midwest always call for cozy hats, so you can’t forget to add an adorable pom beanie.  And nobody does a pom beanie better than my girls from KyiKyi official.  Shop a great selection of their faux-fur pom beanies here, and also here.

Pairing colors from the same color palette gives such a sophisticated look that works for any occasion.  So don’t be afraid to round up your favorite color pieces and see what you come up with!

Shop the Post

Last Week’s Best Sellers

Another week is here, a crazy one at that.  But I am here to give you a little fun distraction with your picks for last week’s best sellers!

This plaid bomber was my top seller, and for good reason!  It is so very cute, comfy, and fits like a bomber jacket should.  The sherpa lining just adds to the cute factor.  Grab this one before it’s gone!

Shop the Post

 

The “It” Sweater is Back!

The “it” sweater of last year is BACK!  And it has even more colors this year, too!  I snapped up a couple of new colors.  You will wear the Easy Street Tunic from Free People ALL THE TIME, I promise.  It is very generously sized, so size down.  I wear a small to keep it nice and oversized (& legging friendly).  Do NOT miss out on this gem again this year!

Shop the Post

 

The Tunic Sweater you NEED!

This sweater continues to be a favorite, and for good reason!  It is so soft and is a great budget-friendly alternative for the popular Free People sweater that has been wildly popular.  It is legging friendly, so soft, and amazing quality.  When it comes to a great option for a Thanksgiving Day outfit, this sweater fits the bill at a great price!

Shop the Post

 

The Popular Wool “Dad” Coat

 

The ever-so-popular “Dad” coat has become a staple on the fall and winter circuit for a lot of people.  This historically masculine coat is now a very versatile and chic option for the ladies and a must-have, in my opinion.  I absolutely love this jacket and wear it all the time.  It’s versatility allows it to be styled both casually and dressy.  And nobody does it better than this Abercrombie version.

Shop the Post

 

It is so fun to see what styles resonate with you all.  It makes me happier than you know when outfits I put together are a hit.  There are some great options for the holidays and beyond.  I would love to know which look is your favorite, so leave me a comment below!  And if you’re looking for more cold-weather options, I have some great ones for you here.

posts.title: Fall & Winter Styles from Abercrombie & Fitch
posts.excerpt: November is here, and so are the chilly temps! Which means it is time for jackets, coats, and all things warm. I am so very excited to partner with Abercrombie & Fitch to bring you some of their newest looks for fall as it turns into winter.   The Long Sherpa Coat This long […]
posts.contentHtml:
November is here, and so are the chilly temps!  Which means it is time for jackets, coats, and all things warm.  I am so very excited to partner with Abercrombie & Fitch to bring you some of their newest looks for fall as it turns into winter.

 

The Long Sherpa Coat

This long sherpa coat is what warm winter dreams are made of.  And might I add stylish dreams, too!  It is luxuriously lined and oh-so-cozy.  I am a huge fan of sherpa coats, but this one heads to the front of the line with its dramatic length.  Available in gray and brown, this coat is not to be missed!

Shop the Post

 

The Vegan Leather Trench Coat

The calendar may say November, but that doesn’t mean we need heavy coats just yet (thank goodness!).  This Vegan Leather Trench Coat is so chic and flattering, accentuating all the right places.  It lends itself so well to a monochromatic look, too.  Bodysuits are a personal favorite of mine, but any lightweight sweater would look great, too.  And the quality is seriously amazing.  This coat is timeless and will be with you for seasons to come!

Shop the Post

 

The Long-sleeve Poplin Bodysuit

Like I mentioned, I am a huge fan of bodysuits.  And this Long-sleeve Poplin Bodysuit gives me all the feels.  A little different from your standard bodysuit, this one gives the illusion of a white button-down shirt.  But it stays perfectly tucked in….bonus!  This classic look will pair with any denim of your choice, but I loved how it came together with this year’s hottest style of jeans, the straight crop.

Shop the Post

 

The Wool Calf-Length Dad Coat

No Abercrombie & Fitch winter would be complete without their infamous Wool-blend Calf-Length Dad Coat.  But this isn’t your dad’s coat anymore!  A lot of brands have their version of this camel staple, but nobody does it better than Abercrombie.  It’s versatility allows this coat to be styled both casually and dressy, and that alone makes it worth the investment.  If you buy one coat this season, let it be the “dad coat”.

Shop the Post

 

A HUGE thank you to the team at Abercrombie & Fitch for letting me live out my dream of sharing some of my favorite pieces from an iconic brand.  This was truly a “pinch me” moment!

With chilly and snowy days ahead, I am styling several looks with Hunter Boots, too.  Check out those looks here!

posts.excerpt: Oh how I love fall and the changing of the seasons. And with fall and winter comes one of my favorite fashions, Hunter Boots! These versatile boots have quickly made their way into my heart as a fun (but practical) fashion accessory for both fall and winter. Whether it's raining, snowing, or you just want […]
posts.contentHtml:
Oh how I love fall and the changing of the seasons.  And with fall and winter comes one of my favorite fashions, Hunter Boots!  These versatile boots have quickly made their way into my heart as a fun (but practical) fashion accessory for both fall and winter. Whether it’s raining, snowing, or you just want to wear a cute pair of boots, I’m excited to show you a few ways to wear Hunter Boots!

Casual & Comfy

Casual and comfy is my jam on most days.  Paired with an oversized sweater and a beanie, Hunter Boots let you pick if you want to put off that effortless vibe for running errands or heading out on a chilly hike.  I actually did both in this look!

Shop the Post

 

Edgy & Fun

Who says rubber rain boots can’t be edgy?  I loved elevating the casual look of the classic Hunter Boot with a graphic tee and faux-fur leopard jacket!

Shop the Post

Preppy and Chic

These shiny red Hunter Boots are SO fun!  They bring such a great pop of color.  With a classic striped sweater and tailored coat, they went from casual to chic!

Shop the Post

 

And last, with leggings

Last up, I would say that no Hunter Boot styling session would complete without my go-to….leggings.  They easily slide right down into your boots, and they give you endless options for what top to choose.  This long tunic and longer puffer vest give you an effortless look that is cute, cozy, and comfy!

Shop the Post

 

There really is no wrong way to style a Hunter Boot!  There are so many fun colors and styles (original or glossy, tall or short…so many options!).  Get creative, and be sure to share with me in the comments (or find me on Instagram and shoot me a message) with what styles you come up. I almost forgot, you could even use my favorite denim jacket as another option!  Happy styling!

posts.title: Fun ways to style a denim jacket
posts.excerpt: Happy Wednesday! Fall is in full swing, and I've had my my favorite denim jacket on repeat already! If you know me, you know a good denim jacket is one of my favorite things I own. So I thought it would be fun to share some fun ways to style a denim jacket. Pair it […]
posts.contentHtml:
Happy Wednesday!  Fall is in full swing, and I’ve had my my favorite denim jacket on repeat already!  If you know me, you know a good denim jacket is one of my favorite things I own.  So I thought it would be fun to share some fun ways to style a denim jacket.

Pair it with a Monochromatic Look

Denim jackets pair so beautifully with monochromatic looks.  And black on black is my favorite!  It is classic, elegant, and even effortless.  Add in a heel and some jewelry to elevate the look.

Shop the Post

 

Leggings are meant for denim jackets!

Leggings go with a lot of things, but none more perfect than a denim jacket.  I added in a longer tunic tank (I’m a big fan of covering the booty when you have on leggings).  You could easily dress this look up with booties or down with sneakers.  Either way, leggings (grab the holy grail of leggings here) will always be a great option for your favorite jean jacket.  Find some other fun looks with these leggings here!

Shop the post

Layering a denim jacket for cooler temps

I am always sad to see fall temps fade into cold weather, partly because denim jackets alone aren’t quite enough for the Midwest winters.  But layering your denim jacket with sweaters and sweatshirts not only gives you a fun and edgy look, it also gives you some opportunities to wear it just a little bit longer.  For an extra fun detail, pull the sleeves of an oversized sweater past the cuff of your denim jacket.  Such an edgy detail, and sneakers just complete the look!

Shop the post

 

These looks are just some of the ways I love to style my denim jacket.  There’s no limit to the number of ways to wear them!  I’d love to know how you wear your favorite denim jacket.  Leave me a comment below to tell me your favorite way to style yours!

posts.title: The Best Smoked Queso Recipe!
posts.excerpt: The season of chips and dip is upon us! And I’ve never met a cheese dip I didn’t love.
posts.contentHtml:
The season of chips and dip is upon us!  And I’ve never met a cheese dip I didn’t love.  This Easy Smoked Queso recipe will change your life, my friends.  You may never look at queso the same again!  With just a few simple ingredients and ready in under an hour, your addition to the tailgate will be the star of the show!

Feel free to spice it up however you like.  You really can’t go wrong here.  If the queso gets too thick, you can thin it out with milk or cream.  Also, this recipe can be done on a standard grill.  The smoke adds an amazing flavor, but the flame from the grill will definitely enhance the flavor, as well!  And if chili is more your jam for game day, be sure to check out my recipe for the BEST chili ever here!

Grab those tortilla chips and enjoy!

posts.title: Cute, comfy, & stylish face masks
posts.excerpt: Who knew that 2020 would be the year of the face mask? It's also the year we all look like bank robbers! But here we are! I get a lot of requests for suggestions on cute and comfy face masks that are still stylish. I've put together a few of my favorites below. Slip Pure […]
posts.contentHtml:
Who knew that 2020 would be the year of the face mask?  It’s also the year we all look like bank robbers!  But here we are!  I get a lot of requests for suggestions on cute and comfy face masks that are still stylish.  I’ve put together a few of my favorites below.

Slip Pure Silk Pleated Face Mask

This mask has become my most-worn face mask.  In addition to being smooth and comfy against my face, this mask is versatile and helps me feel stylish!  I love that it has adjustable straps around the ears.  The quality is impeccable!  The price point is a little higher, but it’s worth every penny.

Fashion PPE Masks from Sanctuary

These masks were the first masks that I purchased when face masks became a required accessory.  I love the fun prints and patterns.  From camo to leopard, they really are an adorable option.  And while they are lightweight and comfortable on my ears, they didn’t launder as well as I had hoped.  Sanctuary seems to have listened to customer feedback and updated the fabrication of the masks so that they last longer and wash well.

Blush Cotton Face Mask from Kitsch

These masks are just darling!  They come in a variety of trendy and feminine prints.  I always receive a lot of compliments on them when I wear them, and they are neutral enough to go with most of my daily outfits.  They are a little on the thicker side, but not enough so that they can’t be worn on a summer day.

Reusable Anti-Dust Sponge Face Mask

These masks are by far the most lightweight and breathable masks I have worn.  They have proven helpful to my daughter for her sporting activities, too.  While they are reusable, they do have a tendency to tear around the ears.  But since they are so affordable, they are easily replaceable.  They also store well in your handbag, which is helpful!

Other masks I’ve heard great things about!

Because mask mandates appear to be a part of at least our near future, I’ve recently ordered another round of masks that have received rave reviews.  These masks are made of soft bamboo, so I’m anxious to report back and give you my thoughts!

These are just some of the mask options I have found that work best for me.  If you’ve found a mask that you love, leave a comment below and let me know!  Also, be sure to check out my latest blog posts on my favorite sunless tanner here!  If you want to try some of my favorite masks, here are some links for you to check them out.

posts.title: How to Style an Oversized White Shirt
posts.excerpt: It's a new week! Fall is nearly here, and I am SO excited to be kicking off a new series of weekly style sessions for you. Each week, I'll be showing you how to style a different piece of clothing that ought to be in your closet. This week, I'm showing you several ways to […]
posts.contentHtml:
It’s a new week!  Fall is nearly here, and I am SO excited to be kicking off a new series of weekly style sessions for you.  Each week, I’ll be showing you how to style a different piece of clothing that ought to be in your closet.  This week, I’m showing you several ways to style an oversized white shirt with one of my favorite partners in crime, the amazing Bonnie Wyrick!  We have both come up with different takes on this classic look, a look that is always cool for fall!

Grab a guy’s white shirt and make it casual!

I literally grabbed my hubby’s white dress shirt and paired it with some distressed jeans and chunky tennies.  So easy, comfy, and effortless!

Shop the post

Date-night ready with denim & neutral accessories!

This look is by far my favorite because it is timeless and classic.  Button-down shirts and jeans go together like peanut butter and jelly!  Add in some subtle, neutral accessories, and you’ll have a quick but chic look to hit the town!

Shop the post

Edge it up with a half tuck & a bold heel!

Looking for a little more edge to the classic white button-down?  Do the half tuck!  Tuck only one side of the front of the shirt.  It’s a fun but bold and unique look that exudes style!  Pop some color with a bright heel (I LOVE a good red heel) along with some red lipstick, and you are all set!

Shop the post

Styling an oversized shirt is so easy!  The possibilities are endless (think leggings, layered over graphic tees….I could go on and on!).  Head on over to my Instagram to see more of the looks I put together.  Be sure to subscribe to my blog here to stay caught up on all things fall!

posts.title: An Update on My Journey with Profile by Sanford
posts.excerpt: Hi, friends! Happy Thursday! My journey with the Profile by Sanford diet is one of my most asked-about topics, so I thought it might be time for an update. Many things have changed in the world since I first shared my journey with you (read my full story here), but one thing has not changed.....my […]
posts.contentHtml:
Hi, friends!  Happy Thursday!  My journey with the Profile by Sanford diet is one of my most asked-about topics, so I thought it might be time for an update.  Many things have changed in the world since I first shared my journey with you (read my full story here), but one thing has not changed…..my love for Profile by Sanford!  This lifestyle continues to be a major part of my day-to-day life.

Profile helped me lose 40 pounds almost two years ago, and I’ve kept it off.  Sure, I’ve had some fluctuations.  That’s normal!  I am an emotional eater, for sure.  So when Covid-19 became a part of our lives in early 2020 and caused us to quarantine, I will admit that some of my old thoughts about food crept in.  With all of the stressors that have come with our new norms, I found myself searching for food to find comfort.  Being home all of the time gave me constant access to snacks and munchies.

But here is where Profile by Sanford and my amazing coaches helped me stay on track.  The one-on-one coaching that Profile by Sanford offers is truly what sets them apart from other programs.  When we began to shelter in place due to Covid-19, my weekly coaching sessions became virtual.  And guess what…..nothing changed except I hopped on a Zoom with my coach instead of being face-to-face.  It was exactly what I needed to keep me on track, and I continue those Zoom meetings to this day.  I actually LOVE still having that accountability each week but also being able to have those meetings from the comfort of my own home.  It’s a win-win for me!

Here is why Profile still works for me…

I know many diets come and go.  Some diets are fads and become the latest internet craze.  Some diets promise quick results to draw you in.  But when it comes to Profile, here is why it stuck for me.  The program and coaches help you see food differently, which was KEY for me as an emotional eater!  I do sometimes look to food with the same emotions I’ve always had.  Old habits die hard, right?

Here’s the key.  I have been able to find foods (both grocery food/recipes and also food that are a part of the Profile by Sanford program) that are SO YUMMY!  I absolutely crave the Profile spaghetti noodles.  My lemon bar in the afternoon is a treat that I look forward every day.  My morning Mocha shake actually gets me out of bed in the morning.  I don’t in any way feel like I’m missing out on anything, and that mindset has been a key piece of my success.

In the end, your success is up to you!

In the end, you get out what you put in.  There is no magic bean for losing weight.  If you completely return to your old way of life, you will end up right back where you started.  But there IS a way to safely lose weight, not feel deprived, and keep that weight off.  That is exactly what Profile did for me, and it’s why my weight has stayed off.

Right before Covid-19, I was able to go to Hawaii for the first, my dream vacation!  I have always loved traveling to beautiful sandy beaches, but what I didn’t love was getting in a swimsuit.  And I assure you there were no pictures allowed when I was at an unhappy (and almost unhealthy) weight.  My hubby snapped this picture of me below while we were there, and it makes me smile when I think of how far I have come.  I am happy in my own skin, and it shows!  We lived in swimsuits that week (check out everything I wore here).

I would love for you to follow along as I continue to share my journey with you all.  Profile by Sanford and my healthy new habits will continue to be a part of my life.  I share a lot of my Profile snack/dinner ideas on Instagram (click here to follow along) and on Pinterest (follow me here).

If you are ready to see how the Profile by Sanford lifestyle can be a part of your life, click here to learn more.  And be sure to use the code TRACY for $100 off.  I hear from so many people who have joined and are on their own journey with Profile, and I’d love to hear from you, too!  Leave a comment below so I can cheer you on!

posts.title: The BEST Sunless Tanning Lotion I Will Never Stop Using!
posts.excerpt: Happy Friday, my friends! I hope you all have had the best week! The weekdays and weekends seem to blur into each other these days, but it has been a good and productive week. With summer still in full swing, I have been working hard to keep that sun-kissed look on my skin. For years, […]
posts.contentHtml:
Happy Friday, my friends!  I hope you all have had the best week!  The weekdays and weekends seem to blur into each other these days, but it has been a good and productive week.

With summer still in full swing, I have been working hard to keep that sun-kissed look on my skin.  For years, I hunted for the perfect sunless tanner.  I have tried SO MANY THINGS!  From drug store options to professional kits, I feel as though I’ve tried it all!  But despite all the claims to the contrary, everything I tried missed the mark.  Every single product either left me with the dreaded orange tint, had an unpleasant odor, rubbed off on my clothes, or left me with streaks.  I’ve honestly never found one that I just love….until now!

My dear friend told me I HAD to try this stuff.  I’ll admit…I was skeptical!  But after one application, I was sold.  Whether you are fair-skinned or have a beautiful olive-tone that I can only dream about, this tanning lotion will work for you!  And the best part is that it’s only $36 for a BIG bottle that will last you a while.  It isn’t for daily use, so you won’t have to replenish too often.  Shop HERE.

It smells divine!

Most sunless tanners are known to have a distinct smell that isn’t that great.  But not this one!  My favorite new find has a subtle but pleasant smell that you won’t mind at all.  If sun-kissed had a smell, this would be it!

It works FAST & lasts!

I noticed my skin developing a subtle tan the day after I applied it.  The color comes gradually, but I promise it won’t rub off.  This sunless tanner is actually a lotion that you apply right after you dry yourself off from the shower.  It goes on just as your daily moisturizer would.  Here’s a tip….I actually add some of my daily moisturizer to my hand and rub the two together.  This keeps my skin moisturized and helps the lotion go on very evenly.  Also, you will love how long it lasts.  Again, this lotion is not for daily use.  I have been using it every 3 days or so and have been super happy with how even my color stays!

It looks so natural!

Gone are the days of looking like you rolled in Cheetoh dust.  This sunless tanner has such a natural tone to it as it develops on your skin.  I have actually received several compliments on how tan I look this summer.  That’s a win in my book!

Although this tanning lotion is extremely easy to use, there are still a few things you can do to get the perfect glow.  Always exfoliate before you use the lotion for the first time.  You won’t want to do that frequently, as that will remove the tan you’ve built.  But it is a good way to prep your skin to get started.  Also, use the lotion sparingly around the elbows, knees, and ankles.  This is true of all self-tanners.  ALWAYS wash your hands after applying, making sure to wash between your fingers and also the inside of your wrists.  I forgot to do that once…..and I definitely had a little darkening the next day.  That’s obviously not what you are looking for!  And finally, let the lotion dry completely before getting dressed.  I adore wearing this $10 towel wrap for a few minutes after I apply the lotion.

So there you have it!  And this is just a good ol’ fashioned product review.  I’m not being paid to say good things, I promise!  Like I said, you will LOVE this tanning lotion.  Say goodbye to worshipping the sun and tanning beds (of course!).  You won’t need them anymore.  Grab your favorite swimsuit and straw hat (check out my favorite hats here!) and hit the beach.  Summer is still calling!

posts.title: My thoughts on how to shop the Nordstrom Sale!
posts.excerpt: Are you shopping the 2020 Nordstrom Anniversary Sale? Unless you've been under a rock, you might have heard that there is a sale going on, LOL! It truly is a great sale and one of my favorites of the year. If you are looking ahead to fall, this is the perfect time to pick up […]
posts.contentHtml:
Are you shopping the 2020 Nordstrom Anniversary Sale?  Unless you’ve been under a rock, you might have heard that there is a sale going on, LOL!  It truly is a great sale and one of my favorites of the year.  If you are looking ahead to fall, this is the perfect time to pick up some staple pieces at a fraction the price before the season even arrives.

But as great as it is…..the sale can be overwhelming.  Social media will convince you that you need it ALL, and that is hard on the wallet!  Frenzy buying may cause you to end up with some things you don’t need simply because everyone else is telling you to buy it.  So here is my advice for shopping the sale SMART!

Before you buy……

  • With each purchase, ask yourself if it’s a need or a want.  I try to limit myself to just 2-3 wants.  It’s always fun to buy something new, but you want to spend your money on something you will actually wear and use.
  • Determine your budget and stay within it!  This is so key, and it will help you narrow down what you really want.
  • Shop early.  This sale is notorious for featuring pieces that sell out.  Some things will restock and some won’t.  I suggest if you’re really on the fence about something, buy it and then make your decision when it arrives.  Nordstrom has such a great and easy return policy, so take advantage of it!
  • It’s a great time to shop for the entire family!  While women’s fashion is by far the biggest seller of the sale, there are some GREAT buys in men’s, kids, home, and beauty!
  • Stick to the staples.  You can definitely find boots, booties, cardigans, denim, and sweaters that are worth investing in!
  • Finally, ask yourself if you REALLY need something.  Is it your style?  The world has changed, and we find ourselves wearing comfy loungewear while staying at home most days.  If you can’t think of at least 2-3 ways to style something, I would suggest passing on it in favor of something you for sure will wear!

Here are some of my favorite purchases and picks that I am still hoping to get my hands on for the sale!

Cute and Stylish Shorts are a Must for Summer

A comfy pair of shorts is a must during the hot summer months.  But if you are anything like me, you may struggle to find shorts that are both lightweight but still cute and girly.  These High-Rise Denim Shorts feature my favorite Tencel fabric and check all of the boxes for a perfect pair of shorts (hello, stretch!).  And the Eyelet Flutter Sleeve Tee has all the feminine vibes and would easily pair with pants or your favorite pair of denim or even a midi skirt as the temps cool down.  I completed the look with these Metallic Slides and Oversized Sunglasses that are so stylish and affordable.  This look is comfy, cool, and perfect for a summer day on the go!

Shop the entire look here!

A High-contrast Look Never Goes Out of Style!

For me, a high contrast pairing will always be high on my list for an effortless and classy look.  You can never go wrong when you pair black and white together.  I will forever be a fan of the halter neck style featured in this Eyelet Halter Top.  It is fun, flirty, and universally flattering on so many body types.  Paired with the Linen Wide-leg Crop Pants, this look will have you date-night ready.  The versatility of a good white pair of pants cannot be overstated.  They will span the seasons for you!  I finished the look with the Jewel Band Flats and Textured Crossbody Clutch.  You will have these on repeat, I promise!

Shop the entire look here!

A Stunning Dress for Any Event!

While I typically gravitate to neutrals, this Pleated Dress in Mykonos Blue has my heart!  Not only is the color absolutely stunning, the fit and feel are perfect for any summer event (weddings, showers, church, and more!).  Adding in the stunning Turquoise Patina Statement Necklace and Metallic Espadrille Heels, I truly felt like a Greek Goddess!

Shop the entire look here!

White House Black Market has always been known for their wear-to-work looks.  But in these uncertain times, the team at WHBM has most definitely stayed on top of the style game with looks for any occasion.  Whether you are working from home, attending an online meeting, or heading out on that long-awaited date, the styles of White House Black Market do not disappoint!

If you aren’t familiar with the Nordstrom Anniversary Sale, it is a great opportunity for  Nordstrom cardholders to grab those fall staples at a fraction of the price.  All of the boots, cardigans, and blankets you could ever want are on sale before the season starts.  Even if you are still soaking up in those final days of summer, this is one sale you don’t want to miss!  Here are my top picks from the sale. posts.contentHtml:
Nothing says summer like a cute straw hat!  And I have found no shortage of adorable options this year.  I have rounded up some of my most favorite straw hats that I have worn throughout the summer for you here.  Whether you’re hanging by the pool, enjoying the beach, or just adding some summer flair to your outfit, these options have you covered!

Panama Hats

Straw Panama hats are so chic and trendy, not to mention comfortable.  They have such a laid back vibe, and they truly look good on everyone!  This $18 option has been one of my go-to’s this year.

I love having a white version of my Panama hat, too!  It’s been on repeat for me, for sure.  It was perfect for vacation but has also been a great addition to some easy summer outfits.

Wide-brim Straw Hats

Straw hats became a fashion statement when the wide-brim option came along!  I have worn these time and time again.  They instantly elevate any summer outfit!  Here are some of my most-worn options.

Also seen here:

The kettle hat style of straw hat has become super popular this season, and I am hooked!  The upturned brim has such a fun and feminine vibe.  The ribbon is just the cherry on top!

The Floppy Straw Hat

I love the unstructured feel of this straw hat.  It’s casual vibe feel is perfect for summer dresses!

How cute is this custom straw hat from The White Invite?  The White Invite specializes in gifts for all, but bridesmaids are their specialty!  This custom floppy straw hat can be embroidered with a custom message of your choice.  It’s absolutely darling, & I loved the branding.  Use code “FASHIONSESSIONS” for 10% off your purchase at The White Invite.  They have so many adorable gift ideas to choose from!

The Rolled Travel Visor

I almost always travel with my hats, but traveling with a hat can be tricky because they consume a lot of space & can get smashed (so sad when this happens!).  The rolled visor is the solution to this problem.  Can I just say SO much yes to these cuties!  They are super affordable and extremely travel-friendly.  I am obsessed with this one!

Whatever your vibe, I’m confident that you can find a straw hat that fits your style….or two, or three!  This is a trend that I am clearly obsessed with.  I would love to see what your favorite style is!  To see how even more ways I styled several of these straw hats on my vacation to Hawaii earlier this year, click here.  Happy straw hat hunting!

posts.title: New Year, Fresh Start with the Easy Styles of Foxcroft
posts.excerpt: The year 2020 is here! I am literally filled with anticipation for everything this new year and new decade will bring. And while I absolutely adore the vibrant pops of color that the holidays always bring (see the adorable holiday Tartans I styled with Foxcroft here), I am ready for the simplicity of winter whites and […]
posts.contentHtml:
The year 2020 is here!  I am literally filled with anticipation for everything this new year and new decade will bring.  And while I absolutely adore the vibrant pops of color that the holidays always bring (see the adorable holiday Tartans I styled with Foxcroft here), I am ready for the simplicity of winter whites and neutrals in the new year.  My friends at Foxcroft are totally on the same page!

A classic white button down never goes out of style, so the Pandora Non-Iron Pinpoint Tunic was an instant favorite for me.  Not only is this top no-iron and super easy to care for (wash, dry, and go), it is versatile enough to be styled multiple ways.   A monochromatic white-on-white look exudes class, elegance, and a fresh palette for the winter months.   Paired with neutral heels and clutch, this timeless pairing is a big win in my book!

I love to take a classic piece from my wardrobe and style it different ways.  And a white button-down shirt like the Pandora Non-Iron Pinpoint Tunic makes that so easy to do!  It’s longer in the back, so that makes it legging friendly (huge plus!).

Last but not least, the Pandora Non-Iron Pinpoint Tunic helps me style one of all time favorite looks, a crisp white shirt paired with denim.  Is there any look that captures cool-but-casual more than this one?  I certainly can’t think of any!  It’s seriously one of my go-to looks.

Foxcroft’s dedication to creating quality, stylish, and easy-to-care-for shirts is why they remain one of my favorite brands.  They offer many takes on the classic white shirt for all styles and body types, so be sure to head over to their White Shirt Shop.  They have so many options to help you find YOUR perfect white shirt or tunic.

As a special gift to you (for a limited time), Foxcroft is offering 20% off your purchase with the code “FASHIONFOX”.  That makes this the perfect time to stock up, simplify, and bring on those beautiful winter whites!

posts.title: Holiday Style & Tartans with Foxcroft
posts.excerpt: What a thrill it is to be styling with Foxcroft. Any company that creates effortless fashion for every-sized woman is a friend of mine! With their crisp, clean, and classic designs, Foxcroft is dedicated to creating quality pieces that are are not only easy to care for but also on-trend! I am excited to show you […]
posts.contentHtml:
What a thrill it is to be styling with Foxcroft.  Any company that creates effortless fashion for every-sized woman is a friend of mine!  With their crisp, clean, and classic designs, Foxcroft is dedicated to creating quality pieces that are are not only easy to care for but also on-trend!  I am excited to show you several ways to style a holiday tartan and velvet tunic from the Foxcroft collection.

Are you still looking for that effortless yet classic holiday look?  Well nothing says holiday more than the Pandora Wrinkle-Free Emerson Tartan Tunic!  With its vibrant red plaid design, longer length, and fuss-free maintenance (just wash, dry, and go!), it fits the bill for so many occasions.

First up, I styled it for a casual look with a pair of cropped denim and booties.  This is perfect if you are heading to a casual holiday party or just out running errands!

Up next is a little holiday glam!  I am breaking all the rules and pairing the Pandora Wrinkle-Free Emerson Tartan Tunic with a gold sequin skirt.  Who made these rules, anyway??  The longer length of the tunic makes it perfect to add a belt (which gives you a great little waistline, by the way!).  Throw on a basic heel, and you are all set for those dressier holiday parties!

And finally, here is where classic meets edge!  I layered the Pandora Wrinkle-Free Emerson Tartan Tunic with a distressed leather jacket, knit beanie, and sock booties to give it a super “cool” vibe.  You could even throw on some over-the-knee boots to really take this look up a notch!  I love that this same top can give you three completely different looks.  A top this versatile needs to be in your closet!

And just in time for those last-minute gifts and holiday parties, the Pandora Wrinkle-Free Emerson Tartan Tunic along with the entire tartan collection is 30% off (December 13th-14th only).  Head over to the Tartan Shop and use code “CHECKITOUT” to take advantage of this awesome sale!

Ahhhh, velvet.  How many ways do I love thee?  My favorite thing about velvet tops are their ability to go from day to night, casual to dressy.  There is just something about velvet that gives me a feeling of timeless glam.  And the Faith Velvet Burnout Dot Tunic does exactly that, plus it adds a modern twist with the burnout fabric.

First up, I paired my new best velvet friend with my also-favorite velvet leggings.  It’s such an easy and comfy look with so much possibility.  I do suggest keeping the leggings on the dressier side (such as a pair of Spanx leggings).  I popped a little color with a hot pink heel, and voila!  You are ready for that date night you have been waiting for or the office meeting (even if you may be dreading that one!).

And last but not least, I give you the girliest of girly…..the Faith Velvet Burnout Dot Tunic paired with a tulle skirt.  Don’t we all need a little velvet and tulle in our lives?  The answer to that is YES!  And you CAN pull off this look, in case you were wondering.  This look is definitely on the dressier side, but hopefully we all have a holiday event that calls for being extra!  Simply tuck the velvet tunic into the tulle skirt (or any skirt, honestly) to channel your inner Carrie Bradshaw.

Foxcroft has so many great looks worth checking out, not only for the holidays but also year-round.  Be sure to use code FASHIONFOX to get 20% off your purchase for a limited time (cannot be combined with other offers).  I can’t wait to see how you style your picks from Foxcroft!

Special shoutout to Natasha Barker Photography for shooting today’s looks!  Check out her page here.

posts.title: Holiday Gift Guide for Men
posts.excerpt: It's that time of year again, my favorite time of year! The smells, the lights, the decorations, cozy nights by the fireplace, hot chocolate, Christmas movies....all of it! I truly love putting a lot of thought into hunting down that perfect gift for all of the special people in my life. But sometimes, that special […]
posts.contentHtml:
It’s that time of year again, my favorite time of year!  The smells, the lights, the decorations, cozy nights by the fireplace, hot chocolate, Christmas movies….all of it!  I truly love putting a lot of thought into hunting down that perfect gift for all of the special people in my life.  But sometimes, that special guy in your life can be a little tricky to buy for.  Well look no further!  I’ve teamed up with my guy (my hubby of 26 years!) to simplify your holidays with this holiday gift guide for men.  Let us help you find just the right gift for HIM!

 

For the guy who likes to keep it casual, comfy and cool, this pullover checks all of those boxes!  It takes you from the gym to that after-work hangout.  Click the tile below to shop the perfect hoodie!

The ever-popular AirPods from Apple will always please the Apple device user in your life.  These are a staple for my husband, he uses them every single day.  I have also linked the newly-released noise-cancelling version of the AirPods.  They are a little bit more of a splurge, but worth it for the guy who is always chasing the latest and greatest version of Apple accessories!

These oh-so-comfy Scuff Slippers from Ugg are one of my husband’s most used gifts ever.  The comfort level of Uggs is second-to-none, but these also have a great “masculine” look to them and come in multiple colors.  These make a great gift for almost any guy in your life!  Their feet will thank you!

This little gadget is a gem!  The Arc Mouse is ultra-slim and goes anywhere because it snaps flat for easy carrying (you can even carry it in your back pocket!).  This wireless device has a non-slip surface and is super easy to use.  If your guy is on the go, this will be a great little surprise to show him that you are thinking of him!

Ok, I am not gonna lie.  I included this cologne as a splurge item.  But when I say that this is the BEST cologne on the market, I am being dead serious.  The scent is TO DIE FOR.  We have tried lots of colognes over the years for my hubby, and he said this is it.  He never wants to wear another cologne in his life.  That is how good it is.  Every time I smell him, my eyes roll in the back of my head and the room spins a little because it is THAT good!  The higher price tag comes from the fact that it is made in France and aged to perfection.  Perfection takes time, and I promise your guy will not be disappointed!  The bottle lasts a long time because a little goes a long way due to its potency.  Just trust me.  You will love this as much as he does!

Peter Millar is what fills up most of my husband’s closet.  So he was excited to see this performance flannel shirt.  Flannel is not his fave, but this shirt is flannel done in a classy and stylish way.  It’s lightweight and comfy but still appropriate for the office.  If you haven’t spoiled your guy with a little something from Peter Millar, you need to start now!  Fit is TTS.

My guy has always been a drug-store product using kind of guy….until he found the line of Kiehl’s facial products for men!  It is fantastic, and he actually told me that he kind of loves taking a shower now so he can use their entire line.  Shhhhhh, don’t tell him I told you that!  Affordably priced, this facial wash (along of their products) is a great addition to his regimen.

As featured on Shark Tank, Bombas Merino Wool Socks are the BOMB-dot-COM!  These are hands down my guy’s favorite sock.  They come in tons of colors and styles and can be worn year-round.  Their mission to donate a pair of socks for each pair purchased makes them a fave in my book, too!  I love to finish off his stocking with a new color of these.

Peter Millar up again! This Suffolk Quilted Water-Resistant Coat will keep your guy stylish and warm without the bulk.  From the comfortable collar to the diamond quilting, this will become an instant favorite.  It’s great for the office and those casual days!

Tumi is such a classic and rugged brand, and this Travel Toiletry Bag (for both men and women) fits that bill!  Its simple yet classic look plus its durability has made this one of my hubby’s most-used gifts.  It fits everything he needs for his trips and is easy to clean.  Ditch the ziplock bags and help your guy travel in style!

Elevate his loungewear with this soft terry sleep pant from Ugg!  These are a really affordable way to bring some style to the way your special guy lounges around the house.  I know they won’t admit it, but they like to be comfy when they get home, too!

Ok, we actually picked these boots out for our “must have” Christmas gift list together because I LOVE them on him.  He loves them because they are comfy, and I love them because they are super stylish.  The Chukka boots from Ugg comes in a gorgeous chestnut or a beautiful dark grey.  He won’t be disappointed!

I’ll admit, wallets aren’t the most exciting gift.  But what can you think of that a guy uses more than his wallet?  Help him get as stoked over his wallet as you do over your purse (ok, maybe not quite as excited, but still!) with this Tumi Double Billfold.  It’s durable and stands the test of time, for sure.  My husband has had his for years, and it’s still going strong.  This gift ensures he is pulling out his wallet in style when he takes you on a date!

Last but certainly not least is the Quip Electric Toothbrush!  This is the coolest little gadget.  It is super budget friendly, too.  So what makes this one different than all of the other electric toothbrushes out there?  Not only does it do a great job cleaning teeth, but it comes in several colors, (some for him and her!) and the batteries last for several months.  It also has a cover for traveling.  And for $5, Quip automatically delivers a fresh brush head and battery every three months.  Practical and cool, this could be one of his favorite gifts!

That’s it!  Hopefully, my sweetheart and I have made your Christmas shopping just a little bit easier this year.  You can click on any of the tiles or links to shop each product in the free LiketoKnow.it app.  Let me know which pick is your favorite for your special guy!  Be sure to follow me here on Instagram to keep up with all of my other gift guides and fashion shenanigans.  I’d love for you to join me here on Pinterest, too!  Let’s pin together!  Happy holidays to each and every one of you!

posts.title: How to Style a Boyfriend Blazer
posts.excerpt: One of my very favorite things in my closet is my collection of blazers, but my favorite kind of blazer to style is the boyfriend blazer! I love ALL kinds of blazers, but the mens-wear inspired look of the boyfriend blazer tops my list. And it is a HOT trend for Fall 2019 (I find […]
posts.contentHtml:
One of my very favorite things in my closet is my collection of blazers, but my favorite kind of blazer to style is the boyfriend blazer!  I love ALL kinds of blazers, but the mens-wear inspired look of the boyfriend blazer tops my list.  And it is a HOT trend for Fall 2019 (I find them to be timeless and always in style, though!). Dress it up, dress it down, your choice!  I wanted to share just a few of the ways I style a couple of the boyfriend blazers I have.

So the thing that sets a boyfriend blazer apart from all other blazers is the length and more straight fit.  While most blazers are waist-length, the boyfriend blazer ends more mid thigh and has a more boxy feel.  They truly are meant to resemble a traditional men’s blazer.

One of the easiest ways to up the cool factor of a boyfriend blazer is to pair it with a band tee, new or vintage.  It can be any color or pattern, because it looks effortless and like you meant to mix the prints.  Shop some of my favorite graphics here and here.  Shop my exact blazer here and similar here.

If you are looking for a more feminine feel for your boyfriend blazer, add at least one fitted piece to your outfit to balance out the looser cut of the blazer.  I added a bodysuit to achieve that fitted look (options here and here), or you can just wear a fitted tank (find my go-to $5 tank here).  This look is definitely date-night ready!  My exact blazer is a little older, but you can shop similar blazers here and here.

I wear leggings all the time in colder weather (shop several styles of my favorite leggings ever here).  But I want my booty covered when I wear leggings, so styling a boyfriend blazer with them is a natural fit.  A tunic-length tank (like this one) is the perfect length to layer your boyfriend blazer.  These over-the-knee boots are super versatile and sexy, perfect for this look!

I’m finishing up with a super cute and casual look.  Switch the shoes and the layer underneath for a completely different vibe for your boyfriend blazer.  Graphic tees are a staple in my wardrobe, but I love to do something fun with them.  Style a boyfriend blazer with your favorite graphic tee, and you have an instant cool and comfy look.  Slip on tennies like these (doesn’t get any comfier and come in a bunch of colors) give you that intentionally casual look for your blazer.

Bottom line, if you don’t have a boyfriend blazer, GET ONE!  They work for nearly all body types and will become one of your go-to pieces in your closet, I promise!  I would love to see how you style your boyfriend blazer!   Shoot me an email to show me at tracy@thefashionsessions.com, or follow me on Instagram here.   See what else I am styling here.  Happy styling!

posts.contentHtml:
With summer getaways in full swing, you have a lot of choices when it comes to destinations and hotels.  I recently had the pleasure of being hosted by the staff of the fabulous Ironworks Hotel Indy on a blogger getaway with my best blogger gal, Christie of Christie Fighting Spirit.  And I can only come up with one word to describe our stay…..WOW!  From the moment you set foot in the lobby, you know that this is going to be an experience unlike any hotel you have ever been in!

We were greeted by an incredibly friendly valet crew and directed to the second-floor lobby.  The architecture is a true throwback to a different time.  I call it Industrial Chic, they call it Industrial Heritage.  But whatever you want to call it, it is simply gorgeous.  The air is purposely scented with a sexy cologne that adds such a nice touch (one of my favorite parts of the hotel). Take a look at some of these images we captured as we walked in.  This awesomeness is just in the lobby!

Nestled in the The Keystone Crossing in Indianapolis, Ironworks Hotel Indy is the north side\’s only boutique hotel and is conveniently located just across from the Fashion Mall at Keystone.  But it is meant to be an experience and a getaway all on its own.  With restaurants for every dining mood, you don\’t ever have to leave.  The hotel features 4 amazing restaurants that are attached to the hotel, including the divine and upscale Provision (with outdoor patios to die for!), Blue Sushi Sake Grill, the breakfast and lunch offerings of Rize, and the curated drinks and outdoor patio of The Daredevil Hall.  The campus also includes Ruth\’s Chris, Sangiovese Ristorante, and Yolk.  You truly never need to leave the hotel to enjoy a variety of dining with enough options to last your entire stay!

Even the walk through the hallway to your room exudes the moody sexiness of this hotel.  When we opened the door to our room, it took a few minutes just to take in all of the details.  We stayed in the Heritage Room that offers luxurious beds, brick walls, a 70\” television, a tufted leather couch in the sitting area, a rustic double work desk, and blackout blinds.  We were blown away!  See all of the different rooms and suites offered by the Ironworks Hotel Indy here.  And trust me when I tell you that each room is an experience and will have you wanting to return to try all of the different levels of rooms and suites.

Even the bathroom continues to show the attention to detail that the Ironworks Hotel Indy offers.  Featuring a white, crisp design, the bathroom is like having your own spa with a large shower and high-end personal care products.  On a side note, the opaque wall of the shower that is visible in the room itself adds a sexy little element if you are traveling with your significant other!

The extra touches continue with a Keurig in every room, a bottle of wine with wine glasses, free to-your-door ice delivery, and available room service from all of the restaurants in the hotel.

If you do decide to leave your room, the Ironworks Hotel Indy features a state-of-the-art fitness area, amazing event spaces, and a spot for your furry family members to grab a drink and a treat.  Yes, they are even pet friendly!

From start to finish, our stay at the Ironworks Hotel Indy was unforgettable.  The staff couldn\’t have been more accommodating.  They went above and beyond to make us feel special, and that is not something I can say about all hotels.  The welcome gift from the staff featuring lots of Indy\’s local offerings (you had me at truffles and popcorn!) was just the cherry on top of a first-rate experience.

I hated for our stay to come to an end, but I am already planning my return visit with my hubby!  Sending a HUGE thank you to the staff of the Ironworks Indy Hotel for making this one of the BEST hotel stays I have ever had.  You have a new fan here, and I will definitely be back!  Be sure to follow along at The Fashion Sessions for more of my travel adventures!

posts.title: My Visit to Kugler Vision, the Best in Omaha!
posts.excerpt: I recently had the opportunity to visit Kugler Vision in Omaha, Nebraska for the first time. My family already goes to Dr. Lance Kugler for all of their eye care and consistently sings their praises. So I decided to check them out for myself since I was long overdue to have my eyes checked. I […]
posts.contentHtml:
I recently had the opportunity to visit Kugler Vision in Omaha, Nebraska for the first time.  My family already goes to Dr. Lance Kugler for all of their eye care and consistently sings their praises.  So I decided to check them out for myself since I was long overdue to have my eyes checked.  I have been to an eye doctor before and somewhat know the drill.  Or at least I thought I did!  Let me just say that my time at Kugler Vision was unlike any other doctor visit I have ever had…in such a good way!

From the sleek architecture to the furniture, from the artwork to even the color of the walls, it is clear that the Kugler team designed their office with the patient in mind.  The windows to the outside are tinted in such a way that they adjust to the amount of light filtering in, which is key given that eye sensitivity would be a factor for many patients.  They have a hospitality area that is not only stunning but also stocked with fruits, yummy snacks, and chilled beverages, even a featured drink of the season!  They actually bake all of their own cookies in house!  I have never experienced something like that before at a visit to the doctor.  You almost feel as though you were at a resort!

I was immediately struck by how calm and serene the front area is.  Little did I know that this is intentional and all part of the patient experience.  Part of this calming environment comes from the fact that something is actually missing!  You won\’t hear any ringing phone lines in the reception area.  In stark contrast to most physician’s waiting rooms, Kugler Vision does not answer their phones in the front area, and you won\’t see any computers, files, or paperwork.  They have an area in the back dedicated to patient services so that the front area remains quiet and undisturbed.

The final stage of my exam was my meeting with Dr. Kugler.  Dr. Kugler was very friendly, not at all in a rush as some doctors seem to be.  He was willing to answer any and all questions I had.  The advanced technology they utilize was further evident as Dr. Kugler pulled up the results of my eye scans that had literally just happened.  Seeing for myself the actual results of my eye scans was really interesting and helpful!

Let\’s be honest, a doctor\’s office is a business.  And the more services they bill out, the more money they make.  But here is where I felt that Kugler Vision, and Dr. Kugler himself, kept my best interests at the forefront.  The staff could have recommended Lasik or any other corrective procedure, and I would have trusted their recommendation.  We are, after all, going to them for the expert opinion.  However, Dr. Kugler told me that not only did I have perfect vision (a huge plus at my age!), but that he didn\’t recommend any vision assistance or corrective procedure at this time, other than regular eye exams.  I truly appreciated his honesty and objective professional opinion.

While I didn\’t need any of the services that are performed in the surgical center, I was given a tour of the remainder of the facilities (which include patient recovery areas, surgery center, and administrative offices).  The recovery rooms are very private, accommodating, and offer dim lighting for comfort.  Surgical patients also go home with an awesome \”swag bag\” featuring a blanket, mug, and more.  Um, I have never been to a doctor who gave me a swag bag….have you?  The procedure room is absolutely top notch.  You can trust that the latest technology is in full use in this room.  One fun fact I can offer is that the surgeons at Kugler Vision let the patient select the music that streams during their procedure.  I find that to be such a thoughtful touch that really reflects the concern they have for a patient’s comfort level.

The doctors and surgeons at Kugler Vision are all local to the area and have a true desire to bring the latest and most innovative technology to Omaha.  Their amazing lineup of doctors includes surgeons Lance Kugler, MD, and Mike Stuntz, MD, plus optometrists Mollie Hiatt, OD, and Dusty McIver, OD.  These doctors are all very committed to supporting local businesses.  One really nice feature is the decor in the examination rooms.  Each room is uniquely decorated to pay homage to some of Omaha\’s most well-known and iconic locations (featuring the Old Market, Blackstone District, Dundee, Elmwood Park, Benson, Florence, Happy Hollow, South Omaha, and Old Town Millard).  Each room is actually its own work of art because Kugler Vision commissioned a local photographer (the amazing Dana Damewood, check her out here or follow her on Instagram) to bring these gems of Omaha to life on the walls of each room.  When you really study this original and life-size artwork, you can feel the staff\’s love for their hometown.

To say that I recommend Kugler Vision is an understatement.  I felt at ease during my entire appointment and left the office confident that I had received the best possible care available.  I will definitely return to them for all of my eye care needs in the future.  Your vision is vitally important and should not be bargain shopped.  If you are searching for an eye doctor in the Omaha area, Kugler Vision is truly the best!
